reason: Verified agent "QA-20260424-214055-ks1r" responds correctly to a simple math question with the expected answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing 3 agents including "QA-20260424-214055-ks1r" with idle status
Found and clicked "QA-20260424-214055-ks1r" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened, showing agent details and message input field
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator shows "idle" in the top right area, meeting the requirement
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field and sent button clicked successfully
Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent responded within 1 second, showing "Worked for 1s"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the answer to "2+2", and screenshot saved as step6-response-with-4.png showing the complete conversation
